══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Bugbear — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Bugbear — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Bugbear — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Bugbear — Iron Concentration HP: 51/67
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Bugbear — Iron Concentration HP: 31/67
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 22 damage. Bugbear — Iron Concentration HP: 9/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Bugbear — Iron Concentration --- HP: 9/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (9/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Bugbear — Iron Concentration is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Bugbear — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Bugbear — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Bugbear — Iron Concentration HP: -7/67
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):15+8=23 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
